task_completion.description: Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles are applied to the correct sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the document text or Navigation pane. There should be 6 main sections styled as Heading 1 (e.g., 'Letter to Shareholders', 'Company Overview', 'Financial Highlights', 'Research Pipeline', 'Consolidated Financial Statements', 'Risk Factors...') and 4 subsections styled as Heading 2 (e.g., 'Revenue Breakdown', 'Operating Expenses', 'Clinical Programs', 'Preclinical Programs').

task_completion.description: A page break is inserted after the cover page and an automated Table of Contents is generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Table of Contents block (usually with dotted leaders connecting headings to page numbers) located after the title/cover content. The main body content ('Letter to Shareholders') should start on a new page (Page 2).

task_completion.description: Track Changes is used to update revenue and R&D figures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for document markup indicating tracked changes (e.g., colored text, strikethroughs, underlines, or margin revision lines). The text '$142.3M' should be struck through and replaced with '$147.8M', and '$68.1M' should be struck through and replaced with '$71.4M'.

task_completion.description: Footnotes are added after sentences containing 'Phase III'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for superscript numbers (e.g., 1, 2, 3) immediately following the text 'Phase III' in the document body. At the bottom of the corresponding pages, look for the footnote text: 'Subject to FDA approval timeline revisions.'

task_completion.description: The Consolidated Financial Statements section is in landscape orientation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the page thumbnails, zoom level, or ruler. The page(s) containing the 'Consolidated Financial Statements' must be noticeably wider (landscape) than the preceding and succeeding pages (portrait).

task_completion.description: Pipe-delimited data blocks in the Financial Statements section are converted to formatted tables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Consolidated Financial Statements section. There should be two distinct tables (Income Statement and Balance Sheet) with visible gridlines. The top header row of each table must be bold and shaded blue. The numeric data in the columns must be aligned to the right.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreOffice Writer (or similar) application window open with the document loaded, rather than just terminal windows running python-docx scripts.

integrity.description: The tracked changes are genuine application-level revisions, not manually colored text.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Track Changes feature being toggled in the UI (e.g., 'Record Changes' highlighted in the Edit/Review menu or status bar), and standard revision formatting (strikethrough for deletions, underline for insertions) rather than just manually applying red font color.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents was generated using the word processor's automated feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The TOC should look like a standard generated field (often highlighting in grey when clicked, perfectly aligned page numbers, standard dotted leaders) rather than manually typed text with manually typed periods.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must have exactly 6 Heading 1s: 'Letter to Shareholders', 'Company Overview', 'Financial Highlights', 'Research Pipeline', 'Consolidated Financial Statements', and 'Risk Factors and Forward-Looking Statements'. It must have exactly 4 Heading 2s: 'Revenue Breakdown', 'Operating Expenses', 'Clinical Programs', and 'Preclinical Programs'. Tracked changes must show '$142.3M' replaced by '$147.8M' (3 occurrences) and '$68.1M' replaced by '$71.4M' (3 occurrences). Exactly 3 footnotes must be present, triggered by the phrase 'Phase III', containing the text 'Subject to FDA approval timeline revisions.' The 'Consolidated Financial Statements' section must be the only landscape section and must contain exactly 2 tables (Income Statement and Balance Sheet) with blue-shaded, bold headers and right-aligned numbers. An automated TOC must be present after the cover page.
